page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m4.8xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, running on an Intel Xeon processor clocked at 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server type does not include local NVMe or SSD storage, requiring external block storage volumes for persistent data. It is equipped with a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio offer a predictable resource density for workloads that require consistent compute performance without the overhead of hyperthreading.

Given its balanced compute-to-memory ratio and lack of integrated GPUs or local storage, the ecs.u2i-c1m4.8xlarge is suited for general-purpose workloads. These include application servers, web serving, containerized microservices, and medium-sized databases that rely on network-attached storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m4.8xlarge is a general-purpose virtual server instance built on the KVM hypervisor and powered by an Intel Xeon x86_64 processor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores operating at 2.7 GHz with a single thread per core, paired with 128.0 GB of system memory. This configuration establishes a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio of 4.0 GB per core. The instance does not include local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage options, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. With its dedicated CPU allocation and absence of hyperthreading, it delivers predictable execution performance. This server is designed for workloads such as web serving, application hosting, containerized deployments, and general-purpose enterprise applications that require consistent compute resources without the need for specialized GPU acceleration or local disk storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m4.8xlarge is a KVM-based server featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores at 2.7 GHz, 128 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for general-purpose workloads.

tagline: A dedicated 32-core Intel Xeon server with a balanced memory profile and 16 Gbps network bandwidth for consistent general-purpose workloads.
